description: This file defines a class SharedPrefsHistoryStore that implements the HistoryStore interface, providing functionality for saving and loading history entries using Android's SharedPreferences.

classes.name: SharedPrefsHistoryStore
classes.description: A history store backed by Android's SharedPreferences, allowing persistent storage and retrieval of history entries.

methods.name: load
methods.description: Loads persisted history entries from SharedPreferences and deserializes them into a list of HistoryEntry.

methods.name: save
methods.description: Serializes and saves the provided list of HistoryEntry into SharedPreferences.
